projectDescription: A native macOS browser for CLI coding-assistant session history — Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI — with full-text search, smart folders, tags, and one-keystroke session resume.
keyFeatures: Multi-provider support: Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI with per-provider data isolation
SQLite FTS5 full-text search across all session transcripts with slash-filter syntax
Smart folders (built-in and custom) for filtering sessions by date, tags, flags, and keywords
Markdown-rendered transcript view with syntax-highlighted code blocks and collapsible tool calls
One-keystroke session resume in Ghostty, iTerm, Terminal.app, Alacritty, WezTerm, or kitty
Menubar dropdown with global hotkey (⌘⇧O) for quick session access from anywhere
Live session detection — green pulse marks sessions actively being written to
iCloud Drive metadata sync (tags, pins, notes, smart folders) without uploading transcripts
Stats dashboard with per-project token usage, cost estimates, and activity heatmaps
In-app auto-update via Sparkle with EdDSA signature verification
Seven built-in themes with full custom palettes and three density modes
Linux/macOS CLI companion for headless environments
publicApiSurface: SearchQuery (struct with titleText, fullText, tags, workspaces, timeWindow fields)
SmartFolder (struct with id, name, query, sortOrder, isBuiltIn)
SessionMetadata (struct with sessionID, workspaceID, title, provider, model, tokenCount, etc.)
